steps.instruction: Wait up to 5 seconds for the Branch link URL to be generated and displayed in the text field below the buttons. The URL should start with 'https://' and contain 'branch' or 'app.link'.
Check if a URL containing 'bnctestbed.app.link' is visible on the screen. The URL will have additional characters after it. If visible, succeed. If not visible, fail the test.
